cd /home/user/rork-app
echo "===== PHASE 1: INSPECT — FULL STATE AUDIT ====="
echo ""
echo "--- SHA Alignment ---"
LOCAL_SHA=$(git rev-parse HEAD)
GITHUB_SHA=$(curl -s 'https://api.github.com/repos/ibb142/rork-global-real-estate-invest/git/refs/heads/main' --max-time 10 2>/dev/null | python3 -c 'import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get("object",{}).get("sha","?"))')
BACKEND_INFO=$(curl -s https://api.ivxholding.com/health --max-time 10 2>/dev/null)
BACKEND_SHA=$(echo "$BACKEND_INFO" | python3 -c 'import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get("commit","?")[:12])')
BACKEND_BOOT=$(echo "$BACKEND_INFO" | python3 -c 'import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get("bootTime","?"))')
BACKEND_ROUTES=$(echo "$BACKEND_INFO" | python3 -c 'import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(len(d.get("routes",[])))')

echo "Local:   $LOCAL_SHA"
echo "GitHub:  $GITHUB_SHA"
echo "Backend: $BACKEND_SHA (boot: $BACKEND_BOOT, routes: $BACKEND_ROUTES)"
[ "$LOCAL_SHA" = "$GITHUB_SHA" ] && echo "Local=GitHub: ALIGNED" || echo "Local=GitHub: MISMATCH"
[ "${LOCAL_SHA:0:12}" = "$BACKEND_SHA" ] && echo "Local=Backend: ALIGNED" || echo "Local=Backend: MISMATCH"

echo ""
echo "--- Landing Page Live State ---"
LANDING_HTTP=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" "https://ivxholding.com" --max-time 15 2>/dev/null)
LANDING_LASTMOD=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -D - "https://ivxholding.com" --max-time 15 2>/dev/null | grep -i "last-modified" | tr -d '\r' | awk '{print $2, $3, $4, $5, $6}')
LANDING_ETAG=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -D - "https://ivxholding.com" --max-time 15 2>/dev/null | grep -i "etag" | tr -d '\r')
echo "HTTP: $LANDING_HTTP | last-modified: $LANDING_LASTMOD | $LANDING_ETAG"

echo ""
echo "--- Reels API State ---"
curl -s "https://api.ivxholding.com/api/reels" --max-time 10 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "
import json,sys
d=json.load(sys.stdin)
print(f'ok: {d.get(\"ok\")} | feed_type: {d.get(\"feed_type\",\"?\")} | total: {d.get(\"total\",\"?\")} | count: {d.get(\"count\",\"?\")}')
reels = d.get('reels', d.get('data', []))
if reels:
  for r in reels[:3]:
    print(f'  reel: id={r.get(\"id\",\"?\")[:20]} | title={r.get(\"title\",\"?\")[:30]} | video={r.get(\"video_url\",r.get(\"media_url\",\"?\"))[:50]}')
else:
  print('  NO REELS IN FEED')
" 2>/dev/null

echo ""
echo "--- Landing Reels JS Live ---"
THRESHOLD=$(curl -s "https://ivxholding.com/ivx-reels.js" --max-time 15 2>/dev/null | grep -oE "intersectionRatio >= 0\.[0-9]+" | head -1)
DEACTIVATE=$(curl -s "https://ivxholding.com/ivx-reels.js" --max-time 15 2>/dev/null | grep -oE "intersectionRatio < 0\.[0-9]+" | head -1)
VIS_CHANGE=$(curl -s "https://ivxholding.com/ivx-reels.js" --max-time 15 2>/dev/null | grep -c "visibilitychange")
DEACTIVATE_REFS=$(curl -s "https://ivxholding.com/ivx-reels.js" --max-time 15 2>/dev/null | grep -c "deactivateCurrent")
CONSOLE_LOG=$(curl -s "https://ivxholding.com/ivx-reels.js" --max-time 15 2>/dev/null | grep -c "console\.log")
echo "threshold: $THRESHOLD | deactivate: $DEACTIVATE | visibilitychange: $VIS_CHANGE | deactivateCurrent refs: $DEACTIVATE_REFS | console.log: $CONSOLE_LOG"

echo ""
echo "--- Member Count ---"
curl -s "https://api.ivxholding.com/api/members/authoritative-count" --max-time 10 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "
import json,sys
d=json.load(sys.stdin)
print(f'members: {d.get(\"members\",\"?\")} | total: {d.get(\"total\",\"?\")} | source: {d.get(\"source\",\"?\")}')
" 2>/dev/null

echo ""
echo "--- Chat Frontend ---"
CHAT_HTTP=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" "https://chat.ivxholding.com" --max-time 15 2>/dev/null)
echo "chat.ivxholding.com: HTTP $CHAT_HTTP"

echo ""
echo "--- www Redirect ---"
WWW_HTTP=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" "https://www.ivxholding.com" --max-time 15 2>/dev/null)
WWW_S3=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -D - "http://www.ivxholding.com.s3-website-us-east-1.amazonaws.com" --max-time 15 2>/dev/null | grep -i "^HTTP\|location" | tr -d '\r')
echo "CloudFront: HTTP $WWW_HTTP | S3 Website: $WWW_S3"

echo "===== PHASE 1C: INSPECT — LANDING PAGE HTML STRUCTURE ====="

echo "--- Landing HTML: Check for black sections (empty divs with dark bg) ---"
curl -s "https://ivxholding.com" --max-time 15 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "
import sys, re
html = sys.stdin.read()
# Check for sections with no content
sections = re.findall(r'<section[^>]*>(.*?)</section>', html, re.DOTALL)
print(f'Total sections: {len(sections)}')
for i, s in enumerate(sections):
  text = re.sub(r'<[^>]+>', '', s).strip()
  has_content = len(text) > 10 or 'img' in s or 'video' in s or 'canvas' in s
  bg = re.findall(r'background[^;]*;', s)
  print(f'  Section {i}: content_len={len(text)} | has_media={\"img\" in s or \"video\" in s} | bg={bg[:1]}')

# Check for reels section
reels_section = re.findall(r'id=\"reels[^\"]*\"[^>]*>(.*?)</section>', html, re.DOTALL)
print(f'Reels sections found: {len(reels_section)}')

# Check for property/deal cards
property_cards = len(re.findall(r'property-card|property-item|deal-card|deal-item|live-deal', html))
print(f'Property/deal card refs: {property_cards}')

# Check ordering: properties vs reels
prop_positions = [m.start() for m in re.finditer(r'property-card|deal-card|live-deal', html)]
reel_positions = [m.start() for m in re.finditer(r'reel-card|reel-item|reels-section', html)]
print(f'Property/deal positions: {prop_positions[:5]}')
print(f'Reel positions: {reel_positions[:5]}')

# Check for horizontal overflow
overflow = re.findall(r'overflow-x:\s*hidden', html)
print(f'overflow-x:hidden count: {len(overflow)}')

# Check for scroll snap
snap = re.findall(r'scroll-snap', html)
print(f'scroll-snap refs: {len(snap)}')
" 2>/dev/null
